= w:en:User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/copyPageContent =
<!-- vim: set syntax=mediawiki textwidth=0 linebreak spell spelllang=en_au,en_gb: -->
<!-- SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2021 User:ClaudineChionh -->
<!-- SPDX-License-Identifier: CC-BY-SA-4.0 OR GFDL-1.3-no-invariants-or-later -->
<!-- [[WP:USL]] listing: §Appearance > Site-wide > Body
{{user script table row
 |doc=User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/copyPageContent
 |desc=Copy the content of the current page or edit form to the system clipboard. (Not yet compatible with the Visual Editor edit form.)
}}
-->

{{Infobox Wikipedia user script
 |name               = copyPageContent
 |desc               = Copy the page content to the system clipboard
 |author             = [[User:ClaudineChionh|ClaudineChionh]]
 |status             = alpha
 |source             = [[User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/copyPageContent.js]]
 |released           = {{Start date and age|2021|11|06|df=y}}
 |version            = 0.3.1
 |updated            = {{Start date and age|2026|03|13|df=y}}
}}

'''copyPageContent''' adds a link in the '''Tools''' menu to copy the raw content of the current page or edit form to the system clipboard. You might find this useful for copying text to a [[WP:TEXTES|text editor]] for thorough editing.

This script uses the Clipboard API – see [https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Clipboard_API browser compatibility].

'''Warning for Visual Editor users:''' This script is not yet compatible with the VE edit form. (I'll work on this issue when I get over my aversion to VE.)

== Installation ==

You can install this script on this Wikipedia by adding the following to your personal [[Special:MyPage/common.js|common.js]] file:

{{tlxs|lusc|User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/copyPageContent.js}}

which expands to:

<syntaxhighlight lang="JavaScript">
mw.loader.load("/w/index.php?title=User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/copyPageContent.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript"); // Backlink: [[User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/copyPageContent.js]]
</syntaxhighlight>

Alternatively, you can install the script globally on all Wikimedia wikis by adding the following to your [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]] file:

<syntaxhighlight lang="JavaScript">
mw.loader.load("//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/copyPageContent.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript"); // Backlink: [[w:en:User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/copyPageContent.js]]
</syntaxhighlight>

[[Category:Wikipedia scripts|copyPageContent]]
